title: Infosys and Roland-Garros Extend AI and Digital Innovation Partnership Through 2031
detailed_summary: Infosys and Roland-Garros announced new AI-powered digital fan experiences for Roland-Garros 2026 and extended their AI and digital innovation partnership through 2031. The announcement highlights fan engagement tools powered by Infosys Topaz, including AI statistics, onsite interactions, match momentum visualization, AI commentary, and AI-assisted journalism enhancements. No financial terms or expected revenue impact were disclosed.

key_facts.fact: Infosys and Roland-Garros extended their AI and digital innovation partnership through 2031.

key_facts.fact: The new experiences leverage Infosys Topaz, an AI-first offering powered by generative and agentic AI technologies.
